query: UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CONCAT('/images/image_', id, '.jpg') WHERE id BETWEEN 9 AND 37;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user reQhEQm8VKDhmxs.root --database TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM --execute UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CONCAT('/images/image_', id, '.jpg') WHERE id BETWEEN 9 AND 37;
